rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Use the existing s API from src/utils/schema.ts and Result<T, E> from src/utils/result.ts instead of importing Zod directly.","scope":"src/utils/configValidator"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The --no-compose flag stops after parallel builds: decompose-state.json is saved but merge/verify/review/ship phases and PR creation are skipped entirely.","scope":"decompose pipeline"}]}
